notes: Previously blocked (Wave 11) on a genuine engine gap: weekday-in-range type existed only in country-hub.js, not at the individual-event schema/engine level.
Unblocked 2026-07-14 by porting weekday-in-range support into src/lib/events/package-schema.js and src/lib/holidays-engine.js.

Rule fields (weekday:6, startMonth:6, startDay:20, endMonth:6, endDay:26) confirmed by dedicated research agent against multiple sources (sweden.se Arabic portal, Wikipedia, timeanddate.com) — matches the pre-existing verified rule in country-hub-data.js exactly.
